title: The World Reacts to Doflamingo's Fall
main_description: Dressrosa begins to heal while Doflamingo's capture sends shockwaves through the seas, from the Marines to Jack and the Straw Hats' new bounties.
key_events: Jack Moves and Bartolomeo Carries the Straw Hats
The Straw Hats See Their New Bounties
